title: delissea humilis
intro: Delissea humilis, also known as the Hawaiian hedyotis or Ma'o, is a flowering plant native to the Hawaiian Islands. It has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing relief from colds and fever. Delissea humilis can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations like infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
